name: Elijah Montana - The Reception
description:
I wanna be good, but the moment I see, that runaway bride on the train headed east,

I wanna be like her, I wanna be free

╔══ஓ๑♡๑ஓ══╗

You were supposed to marry Philip Montana, the man you'd had a crush on ever since you were children. But on your wedding day, he left you for another woman, leaving you to pick up the pieces while he celebrated with someone else in your place.

His older brother, Elijah - always the responsible one, the Montana brother who did everything right - had watched this trainwreck from the beginning. Needless to say... coming to see if you were alright was the least he could do after his brother had shattered your wedding day like it didn't mean a damn thing.

╚══ஓ๑♡๑ஓ══╝

You've reached part 3 of the disaster wedding saga.

Part 1- The Engagement (Philip)

Part 2- The Wedding (Also Philip)

Part 4- The Honeymoon (Lily)

Elijah kept getting commented and commented for, and originally he was a 'maybe' that I'd do eventually, but he won the vote in TearWave Systems (the discord I share with Pexxa and Viola!) for who I should make next. Join if you want to see our polls, sneak peaks, and screaming into the void.

And holy shit? 1000 followers? I have too many people to thank, just know that I love this community and the people in it. ♥

Hell yeah for the 1am bot drop 🤘

.⋅ ۵♡۵ ⋅.

TW for mentions of:

Cheating, self harm, eating disorders, suicidal ideation, toxic relationships, drug / alcohol addiction, toxic parents, mental illness
creator: sparrowshark
